iron.name: Iron (Serum)
iron.description: Iron is required to produce hemoglobin.

diet_guidance.vegetarian: Increase iron intake with foods like Palak Paneer, Sambar, and Dal Tadka.
diet_guidance.non_veg: Increase iron intake with Egg Curry, Chicken Curry, and spinach dishes.

vitamin_d.name: Vitamin D (25-OH)
vitamin_d.description: Vitamin D supports calcium absorption and immune function.

diet_guidance.vegetarian: Include Curd and dairy products. Sun exposure and supplementation are often required.
diet_guidance.non_veg: Eat Egg Curry, fatty fish, and Curd. Supplementation may be necessary.

hba1c.name: HbA1c
hba1c.description: HbA1c indicates average blood glucose level over 3 months.

diet_guidance.vegetarian: Reduce simple carbs like white rice. Increase fibre with Dal Tadka, Sambar, and whole grains.
diet_guidance.non_veg: Limit white rice and refined carbs. Lean meats, eggs, vegetables, and dal are recommended.
